signupSent.title: Check your email
signupSent.body: We've sent a verification link to <1>{{email}}</1>. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.
signupSent.didntGetItPrefix: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder, or

signInSubtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to manage your events.
signUpSubtitle: Create your account to get started.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
reset.sent: Reset link sent! Check your email — click the link, then come back here to set your new password.

setPassword.title: Set New Password
setPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.

error.connect: Unable to connect. Please try again.
error.sendReset: Could not send reset email. Please try again.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
